title: polystichum aculeatum var. proliferum
intro: Polystichum aculeatum var. proliferum, also known as the proliferous prickly fern, is a variety of the prickly fern plant that has distinctive proliferous rhizome buds, producing new fronds. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum aculeatum var. proliferum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be taken internally or used topically to treat various ailments.
